commands.repair_reason: The redaction fix is mechanical, but the merge gate is missing contributor real-behavior proof, so this should stay in human/contributor review rather than a repair lane.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a log privacy regression by printing auth profile IDs without the existing redaction helper.; Review finding: [P2] Redact profile IDs in post-run auth logs — src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.ts:1184 (sha=5eaa8d7f9606c647c310eb940e0cb201ab4841c4)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves successful auth-profile bookkeeping in `runEmbeddedPiAgent` into a fire-and-forget post-run helper with slow/failure logging and adds a runner regression test for nonblocking return.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was run in this review. The linked issue gives concrete v2026.5.20 Discord timing logs, and source inspection shows current main awaits `markAuthProfileSuccess` on the lane after `embedded run done`.
commands.review_followup: The redaction fix is mechanical, but the merge gate is missing contributor real-behavior proof, so this should stay in human/contributor review rather than a repair lane.

target.title: Avoid post-run auth success lane delay
target.body:
## Summary

- move post-run auth-profile success bookkeeping off the reply-blocking embedded-run path
- log slow or failed post-run auth-success bookkeeping so future lock contention is visible
- add regression coverage proving a completed embedded run returns while auth-success bookkeeping is still pending

Fixes #85822

## Validation

- /Users/andy/openclaw/openclaw-85521/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --write --threads=1 src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.overflow-compaction.loop.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.overflow-compaction.loop.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles/profiles.test.ts src/process/command-queue.test.ts
  - Test Files: 5 passed (5)
  - Tests: 94 passed (94)
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt-stage-timing.test.ts src/logging/diagnostic-stuck-session-recovery.runtime.test.ts
  - Test Files: 2 passed (2)
  - Tests: 20 passed (20)
